improvements.improvement: When acceptance criteria require blob verification, require explicit data-plane blob existence checks (`az storage blob exists`) in the workflow, not telemetry-only signals.
Avoid selecting Azure resources by positional queries like `[0]`; always derive resource names from deployed app configuration or explicit environment inputs.
Prompt should explicitly require smoke tests to correlate checks to the current run (e.g., pre-clean staging artifacts or use unique run identifiers) so stale data cannot cause passing results.
